description: Python library preset with conservative library defaults.

commands.install: python -m pip install -U pip && python -m pip install -e ".[dev]"
commands.run: python -c "print('No runtime entrypoint for a library. See README.')"

assumptions: This preset assumes a library-style repo (src/, tests/) and a dev extra for tooling.
If you use Poetry/uv, replace install/test commands accordingly.
where_to_edit: Edit commands in .agentsgen.json to match your toolchain (uv/poetry/pip).
